blocks.text: Hovland Chases the Green Jacket as Masters Round 1 Begins

Augusta calls. Viktor Hovland and Kristoffer Reitan tee off in golf's most iconic major. By afternoon, FIDE Candidates Round 10 enters decisive territory — the World Championship challenger may emerge today.
⛳ Masters Tournament Round 1 — Hovland and Reitan hunt Augusta glory
♟️ FIDE Candidates Round 10 — decisive round, World Championship challenger likely emerges today
🎮 CS2 PGL Bucharest 2026 — rain (Håvard Nygaard) represents Norway on the server
